_comment: Plan-then-act — planner LLM emits a numbered plan first, then an
executor ReAct subgraph carries the plan out with tools. Compresses
the ouroboros Interview→Seed→Execute spine into two LLM stages
without the math gates. Suited to medium-complexity tasks where
the user's intent is clear but the implementation has several
steps that benefit from being enumerated before any tool fires.
Per-stage prompts override the inherited agent.system_prompt via
name: plan_then_act

planner.prompt: You are a planning specialist. Given the user's coding task, output a numbered plan of 3–7 concrete steps. Each step is one sentence. Do NOT call tools, do NOT write code, do NOT execute anything. End your reply with the line: PLAN COMPLETE.
